impact: This advances checkbox-120 by adding a deterministic, source-backed PP&D fixture with exactly seven trade-permit purchase requirement categories for future extractor and guardrail validation.
summary: Add a redacted fixture-only expected output for online trade permit purchase requirement extraction.
target_task: Task checkbox-120: Add a minimal online trade permit purchase requirement extraction expected-output fixture with exactly seven category records: eligibility, trade scope, required applicant/license facts, fee/payment checkpoints, inspection scheduling, cancellation/finalization, and explicit-confirmation gates, all source-backed and redacted.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
